title: Gold Serving Tray with Handles, 10.6'' Round Decorative Tray Acrylic Perfume Plate Reusable Plastic Serving Platters, Amber Gold Make Up Display Tray for Home, Coffee Table, Breakfast, Tea, Fruit
features: 1. Elegant Gold Serving Tray Design – This gold serving tray features two elegant golden handles for easy transport, perfect for moving from room to room with ease. Whether you're serving drinks, breakfast, or appetizers, the tray’s stylish design and convenient size (27x27cm) make it ideal for any occasion.

2. High-Quality Acrylic Material – Made from durable, high-quality acrylic decorative tray plastic, this tray offers crystal-clear transparency and a smooth finish. Its sturdy construction ensures long-lasting use, while the easy-to-clean surface makes maintenance a breeze. It won’t absorb water like wooden trays and keeps your serving area spotless.

3. Versatile and Practical Tray – This round decorative tray is not just for serving food. It can also be used as a perfume tray, or to display fruit, snacks, or even makeup and jewelry. Ideal for use in kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, or as a coffee table accessory, it’s a great way to keep your space organized and stylish.

4. Stylish Gold Accents for Any Room – With its sleek golden handles and smooth surface, this gold round tray adds a touch of luxury to any room. Whether used on a coffee table, vanity, or as a decorative centerpiece, this tray brings an elegant, modern touch to your home decor or office setting.

5. Perfect for Entertaining – Serve your guests in style with this gold trays decorative round tray. It's perfect for carrying and presenting drinks, appetizers, desserts, and snacks. Whether at a family gathering, party, or special occasion, this tray enhances your entertaining experience with its timeless beauty and practicality.
description: Product Description: Add a touch of luxury to your home with this 10.6'' Round Decorative Tray featuring golden handles. Made from durable, high-quality acrylic plastic, this gold serving tray is designed for both beauty and functionality. Its crystal-clear surface, smooth edges, and solid construction ensure that it’s not only easy to clean but also built to last. Perfect for various uses, this round decorative tray is ideal for serving food, drinks, or as a storage solution for cosmetics, jewelry, and small items. Its versatile design makes it suitable for use in the kitchen, bathroom, living room, or even on your desk or dresser. The stylish gold accents make this tray a perfect addition to any space, adding an elegant flair to your decor. This gold tray is the ideal serving companion for breakfast, afternoon tea, or cocktail hour, and its sturdy golden handles make it easy to carry and transport. Whether you're hosting a dinner party or enjoying a quiet morning, this tray is sure to impress. Its practical yet stylish design makes it the perfect gift for housewarmings, birthdays, or any special occasion. Specifications: Material: Acrylic Plastic Colour: Golden Diameter : 27cm Thickness: 2mm Package includes: 1x Plastic Tray Notes: We value customer satisfaction, if the item you received is damaged due to the inevitable extrusion and collision during transportation, please contact us in time, we will solve your problem within 24 hours.
